components.comment: 가입폼 결제 통화 선택 (A4 / D-LOGIN-CUR — 이커머스 설치 시에만). 기본값=세션 통화(>locale 추정>기본통화). name 바인딩으로 registerForm 에 자동 포함 → /api/auth/register 제출.
components.name: Div

props.className: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 mb-1

props.name: preferred_currency
props.options: {{(_global.modules?.['sirsoft-ecommerce']?.language_currency?.currencies ?? []).filter(c => c.is_default || (c.exchange_rate ?? 0) > 0).map(c => ({ value: c.code, label: c.code + ' (' + (c.symbol ?? c.code) + ')' }))}}
props.className: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500
